name: Orbit — Relationship Intelligence
description: Automatic relationship graph builder. Ingests WhatsApp, Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and Linear. Delivers pre-meeting briefs and going-cold digests. Exposes tools for network lookup, person cards, and intro-path search.

apiKey.description: Orbit API key for ingesting signals. Get one from your Orbit dashboard.

apiUrl.description: Orbit API base URL. Override for self-hosted instances.
